en.title: **DevOps Engineer**
en.text: At MasterControl, I worked at the intersection of DevOps, platform engineering, and developer productivity. My focus was building scalable infrastructure and automation that enabled engineering teams to ship software faster and more reliably. I designed and maintained CI/CD pipelines, optimized build systems, and managed Kubernetes-based environments used across multiple development teams. Much of my work involved creating internal tooling and automation using TypeScript, Docker, and Kubernetes to simplify complex deployment workflows. I also collaborated closely with developers to troubleshoot pipelines, improve reliability, and standardize processes across repositories and environments, helping teams focus more on building products rather than managing infrastructure.

en.title: **Software Engineer**
en.text: At Capgemini, I worked on backend and platform engineering for large-scale enterprise systems supporting healthcare and imaging technologies. I helped design and build CI/CD pipelines and deployment workflows using Jenkins, Git, and Terraform to reliably ship Dockerized services across multiple environments. My work also included developing RESTful APIs and internal dashboards with Node.js, Express, and React, while improving system performance through database optimizations with PostgreSQL and Redis caching. Beyond application development, I automated infrastructure and testing processes using Bash, Python, and Cypress, helping teams reduce manual effort and improve the reliability of both deployments and monitoring systems.

en.title: **Web Development** Intern
en.text: Contributed to the development of robust frontend and backend systems for Credit Management System, integrating third-party services and improving data processing efficiency through cloud functions.
